body:
frenchvelvetkisses:

give a girl with a voice kink the silent treatment, then tell her she isn’t allowed to make a sound either and just…watch her break. do everything right. touch her perfectly, find all the right spots, and work them agonizingly slow but do it in total silence. no praise, no good girl, no dirty talk, no guidance. just a cold, focused stare that never leaves her eyes. she’ll get so desperate for your voice that she’ll start begging for just one word to let her know you’re happy with her. craving your approval more than she’s begging to cum. but when you finally let her cum, as she’s about to break, finally lean down and let your voice melt into her ear “there she is. I’ve got you baby. you’ve been so incredibly quiet for me, such a perfect little thing. you want to hear it so badly ? you’re such a good girl. my sweet, obedient girl. I’m right here…go ahead and let it out for me. come on sweetheart, scream my name and let me hear exactly how much you missed me.”
